title: Lemonade, Inc. (LMND) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
text: Lemonade Inc LMND stock overview and summary. Company: Digital-first insurance company offering renters, homeowners, auto, pet, life insurance across U.S. and international markets. Recent performance: Strong growth trajectory with revenue reaching $258 million Q1 2026 (71% YoY growth). In-force premium $1.33 billion (32% growth). Stock trades NYSE under ticker LMND. Recent developments: Morgan Stanley upgrade to Overweight on Tesla autonomous vehicle insurance partnership. Analyst sentiment: Mixed, with consensus Hold rating despite strong operational growth. Price targets: Average $64-66, range $33-92. Valuation: Price-to-sales 8.7x, premium to industry. Key catalysts: Tesla FSD adoption acceleration, path to EBITDA profitability 2026, GAAP profitability 2027. Recent strengths: 10th consecutive quarter growth acceleration, pet insurance surpassed $500M in-force premium, autonomous car insurance launch Arizona/Oregon, AI-driven claims automation 55% instant processing.
